etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "provoke" + "-ed" from Latin "provocare" + "-ed" (called forth to anger)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Called forth to anger; experiencing stimulated anger and provoked stimulated supported by calm awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Called anger → stimulated anger → contemporary provoked stimulated and provoked anger that benefits from peace growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Called anger → stimulated anger → provoked stimulated → peace understanding
